## Table of Contents

### <a name="bird"></a>`bird`

the main bird class

#### Parameters

The following parameters are available in the `bird` class:

* [`config_file`](#-bird--config_file)
* [`config_dir`](#-bird--config_dir)
* [`config_owner`](#-bird--config_owner)
* [`config_group`](#-bird--config_group)
* [`config_mode`](#-bird--config_mode)
* [`config_dir_mode`](#-bird--config_dir_mode)
* [`packages`](#-bird--packages)
* [`package_ensure`](#-bird--package_ensure)
* [`generic_configs`](#-bird--generic_configs)
* [`incl_protocols`](#-bird--incl_protocols)
* [`functions`](#-bird--functions)
* [`default_function_order`](#-bird--default_function_order)
* [`filters`](#-bird--filters)
* [`default_filter_order`](#-bird--default_filter_order)

##### <a name="-bird--config_file"></a>`config_file`

Data type: `Stdlib::Absolutepath`

the main config file

Default value: `'/etc/bird/bird.conf'`

##### <a name="-bird--config_dir"></a>`config_dir`

Data type: `Stdlib::Absolutepath`

directory where we put all additional
files

Default value: `'/etc/bird/bird.d'`

##### <a name="-bird--config_owner"></a>`config_owner`

Data type: `String[1]`

owner of config files

Default value: `'bird'`

##### <a name="-bird--config_group"></a>`config_group`

Data type: `String[1]`

group of config files

Default value: `'bird'`

##### <a name="-bird--config_mode"></a>`config_mode`

Data type: `String[1]`

mode of config files

Default value: `'0640'`

##### <a name="-bird--config_dir_mode"></a>`config_dir_mode`

Data type: `String[1]`

mode of the $config_dir

Default value: `'0750'`

##### <a name="-bird--packages"></a>`packages`

Data type: `Array[String[1]]`

Array of packages to manage

Default value: `['bird2']`

##### <a name="-bird--package_ensure"></a>`package_ensure`

Data type: `String[1]`

ensure parameter for packages

Default value: `'installed'`

##### <a name="-bird--generic_configs"></a>`generic_configs`

Data type: `Hash[String[1], Bird::Define::Generic]`

config files to create with
the define bird::generic
Remark: this parameter is hash merged

Default value: `{}`

##### <a name="-bird--incl_protocols"></a>`incl_protocols`

Data type: `Array[Bird::Protocols]`

list of protocols to include (in a simple
configuration. Includes the classes
bird::protocols::____

Default value: `['device','direct','kernel']`

##### <a name="-bird--functions"></a>`functions`

Data type: `Hash[String[1], Bird::Function]`

Hash of functions to define
Remark: this parameter is hash merged

Default value: `{}`

##### <a name="-bird--default_function_order"></a>`default_function_order`

Data type: `String[1]`

the default order for functions if no order is set

Default value: `'20'`

##### <a name="-bird--filters"></a>`filters`

Data type: `Hash[String[1], Bird::Filter]`

Hash of filters to define
Remark: this parameter is hash merged

Default value: `{}`

##### <a name="-bird--default_filter_order"></a>`default_filter_order`

Data type: `String[1]`

the default order for filters if no order is set

Default value: `'30'`

### <a name="bird--config"></a>`bird::config`

##### <a name="-bird--config--router_id"></a>`router_id`

Data type: `Optional[String[1]]`

router ID. It is a unique identification of your router,
usually one of IPv4 addresses of the router.

Default value: `undef`

##### <a name="-bird--config--log"></a>`log`

Data type: `Optional[String[1]]`

log option

Default value: `undef`

##### <a name="-bird--config--tables"></a>`tables`

Data type: `Hash[String[1],Bird::Table]`

tables to initialize

Default value: `{}`

##### <a name="-bird--config--constants"></a>`constants`

Data type: `Hash[String[1],Bird::Constant]`

Hash of defined constants
Remark: hiera hash merged

Default value: `{}`

##### <a name="-bird--config--generic"></a>`generic`

Data type: `Hash[String[1],Bird::Conf]`

generic config options
Remark: hiera hash merged

Default value: `{}`

### <a name="bird--protocols--bgp"></a>`bird::protocols::bgp`

notes: the distinction betwen templates and instances
       is only about the storage path of the config.
       (so you can actually put templates in instances and vice
       versa)

#### Parameters

The following parameters are available in the `bird::protocols::bgp` class:

* [`templates`](#-bird--protocols--bgp--templates)
* [`instances`](#-bird--protocols--bgp--instances)
* [`default_template_order`](#-bird--protocols--bgp--default_template_order)
* [`default_instance_order`](#-bird--protocols--bgp--default_instance_order)

##### <a name="-bird--protocols--bgp--templates"></a>`templates`

Data type: `Array[Bird::Bgp::Instance]`

bgp templates to create
(do not forget to set is_template to true !)
Remark: parameter hiera unique merged

Default value: `[]`

##### <a name="-bird--protocols--bgp--instances"></a>`instances`

Data type: `Array[Bird::Bgp::Instance]`

bgp instances to create
Remark: parameter hiera unique merged

Default value: `[]`

##### <a name="-bird--protocols--bgp--default_template_order"></a>`default_template_order`

Data type: `String[1]`

the default order for templates if no order is set

Default value: `'55'`

##### <a name="-bird--protocols--bgp--default_instance_order"></a>`default_instance_order`

Data type: `String[1]`

the default order for instances if no order is set

Default value: `'60'`

### <a name="bird--protocols--device"></a>`bird::protocols::device`

add a default device protocol

* **Note** for more sophisticated configs, use the bird::generic resource

### <a name="bird--protocols--direct"></a>`bird::protocols::direct`

add a default direct protocol

* **Note** for more sophisticated configs, use the bird::generic resource

#### Parameters

The following parameters are available in the `bird::protocols::direct` class:

* [`disabled`](#-bird--protocols--direct--disabled)
* [`ipv4`](#-bird--protocols--direct--ipv4)
* [`ipv6`](#-bird--protocols--direct--ipv6)
* [`interfaces`](#-bird--protocols--direct--interfaces)

##### <a name="-bird--protocols--direct--disabled"></a>`disabled`

Data type: `Boolean`

set to true to disable the protocol

Default value: `true`

##### <a name="-bird--protocols--direct--ipv4"></a>`ipv4`

Data type: `Boolean`

true: Connect to default IPv4 table

Default value: `true`

##### <a name="-bird--protocols--direct--ipv6"></a>`ipv6`

Data type: `Boolean`

true: Connect to default IPv6 table

Default value: `true`

##### <a name="-bird--protocols--direct--interfaces"></a>`interfaces`

Data type: `Array[String[1]]`

Array of interface definitions

Default value: `[]`

The following parameters are available in the `bird::protocols::kernel` class:

##### <a name="-bird--protocols--kernel--proto_enable"></a>`proto_enable`

Data type: `Array[Enum['ipv4','ipv6']]`

protocols to enable

Default value: `['ipv4','ipv6']`

##### <a name="-bird--protocols--kernel--ipv4"></a>`ipv4`

Data type: `Bird::Kernel::Instance`

ipv4 protocol configuration

Default value: `{}`

##### <a name="-bird--protocols--kernel--ipv6"></a>`ipv6`

Data type: `Bird::Kernel::Instance`

ipv6 protocol configuration

Default value: `{}`

### <a name="bird--service"></a>`bird::service`

ensure the bird service

#### Parameters

The following parameters are available in the `bird::service` class:

* [`service_ensure`](#-bird--service--service_ensure)
* [`service_enable`](#-bird--service--service_enable)
* [`service_name`](#-bird--service--service_name)

##### <a name="-bird--service--service_ensure"></a>`service_ensure`

Data type: `String`

Whether a service should be running.
Defaults to 'running'

Default value: `'running'`

##### <a name="-bird--service--service_enable"></a>`service_enable`

Data type: `Boolean`

Whether a service should be enabled.
Defaults to true

Default value: `true`

##### <a name="-bird--service--service_name"></a>`service_name`

Data type: `String`

The name of the service

Default value: `'bird'`

## Defined types

### <a name="bird--generic"></a>`bird::generic`

generic define to add a file into the config directory

#### Parameters

The following parameters are available in the `bird::generic` defined type:

* [`filename`](#-bird--generic--filename)
* [`order`](#-bird--generic--order)
* [`comments`](#-bird--generic--comments)
* [`content`](#-bird--generic--content)

##### <a name="-bird--generic--filename"></a>`filename`

Data type: `Optional[String[1]]`

filename to use
defaults to undef wich generates a filename in
the form "${order}-${title}.conf"

Default value: `undef`

##### <a name="-bird--generic--order"></a>`order`

Data type: `String[1]`

order to use to generate filename

Default value: `'00'`

##### <a name="-bird--generic--comments"></a>`comments`

Data type: `Array[String[1]]`

Array of comments to add

Default value: `[]`

##### <a name="-bird--generic--content"></a>`content`

Data type: `Optional[String]`

content to put into the file

Default value: `undef`

## Functions

### <a name="bird--condprint"></a>`bird::condprint`

Type: Puppet Language

used for templates to conditional print statements

#### `bird::condprint(String $prefix = '', Optional[Variant[String,Integer,Boolean]] $val = undef, Optional[String] $postfix = undef, Boolean $is_string = false)`

used for templates to conditional print statements

Returns: `String` printable string for bird config file

##### `prefix`

Data type: `String`

prefix the value with this string (if value is not undef)

##### `val`

Data type: `Optional[Variant[String,Integer,Boolean]]`

the value to print if it is not undef

##### `postfix`

Data type: `Optional[String]`

postfix the value with this string (if value is not undef)

##### `is_string`

Data type: `Boolean`

setting this to true results in encapsulating value
in "

## Data types

### <a name="Bird--Bgp--Instance"></a>`Bird::Bgp::Instance`

bgp instance definition

Alias of

```puppet
Struct[{
    'order'                     => Optional[String[1]],
    'channels'                  => Optional[Hash[String[1],Bird::Channel]],
    'bgp_name'                  => Optional[String[1]],
    'template'                  => Optional[String[1]],
    'is_template'               => Optional[Boolean],
    'neighbor'                  => Optional[Bird::Bgp::Neighbor],
    'local'                     => Optional[Bird::Bgp::Local],
    'interface'                 => Optional[String[1]],
    'vrf'                       => Optional[String[1]],
    'enable_extended_messages'  => Optional[Boolean],
    'require_extended_messages' => Optional[Boolean],
    'capabilities'              => Optional[Boolean],
    'advertise_hostname'        => Optional[Boolean],
    'require_hostname'          => Optional[Boolean],
    'disable_after_error'       => Optional[Boolean],
}]
```

### <a name="Bird--Bgp--Local"></a>`Bird::Bgp::Local`

bgp local definition

Alias of

```puppet
Struct[{
    'ip'     => Optional[String],
    'port'   => Optional[Integer],
    'as'     => Optional[Integer],
}]
```

### <a name="Bird--Bgp--Neighbor"></a>`Bird::Bgp::Neighbor`

bgp neighbor definition

Alias of

```puppet
Struct[{
    'ip'     => Optional[String[1]],
    'prefix' => Optional[String[1]],
    'port'   => Optional[Integer],
    'as'     => Optional[Integer],
    'type'   => Optional[Enum['internal','external']],
}]
```

### <a name="Bird--Channel"></a>`Bird::Channel`

definition of a channel

Alias of

```puppet
Struct[{
    'debug'                       => Optional[Variant[Enum['all','off'], String[1]]],
    'table'                       => Optional[String[1]],
    'preference'                  => Optional[String[1]],
    'import'                      => Optional[Variant[Enum['all','none'],String[1]]],
    'export'                      => Optional[Variant[Enum['all','none'],String[1]]],
    'import_keep_filtered'        => Optional[Boolean],
    'rpki_reload'                 => Optional[Boolean],
    'import_limit'                => Optional[Variant[Integer,String[1]]],
    'receive_limit'               => Optional[Variant[Integer,String[1]]],
    'export_limit'                => Optional[Variant[Integer,String[1]]],
    # bgp only:
    'mandatory'                   => Optional[Boolean],
    'next_hop_keep'               => Optional[Variant[Boolean,Enum['ibgp','ebgp']]],
    'next_hop_self'               => Optional[Variant[Boolean,Enum['ibgp','ebgp']]],
    'next_hop_address'            => Optional[String[1]],
    'next_hop_prefer'             => Optional[Enum['global']],
    'gateway'                     => Optional[Enum['direct', 'recursive']],
    'igp_table'                   => Optional[String[1]],
    'import_table'                => Optional[Boolean],
    'export_table'                => Optional[Boolean],
    'export_settle_time'          => Optional[String[1]],
    'secondary'                   => Optional[Boolean],
    'validate'                    => Optional[Boolean],
    'base_table'                  => Optional[String[1]],
    'extended_next_hop'           => Optional[Boolean],
    'require_extended_next_hop'   => Optional[Boolean],
    'add_paths'                   => Optional[Variant[Boolean,Enum['rx','tx']]],
    'require_add_paths'           => Optional[Boolean],
    'aigp'                        => Optional[Variant[Boolean,Enum['originate']]],
    'cost'                        => Optional[Integer],
    'graceful_restart'            => Optional[Boolean],
    'long_lived_graceful_restart' => Optional[Boolean],
    'long_lived_stale_time'       => Optional[Integer],
}]
```

}]

}]

Alias of `Enum['unreachable', 'blackhole']`

### <a name="Bird--Static--Via"></a>`Bird::Static::Via`

static route definition

Alias of

```puppet
Variant[Stdlib::Ip::Address, String[1], Struct[{
      'ip' => Optional[Stdlib::Ip::Address],
      'direct' => Optional[String[1]],
      'dev'    => Optional[String[1]],
      'weight' => Optional[Integer],
      'bfd'    => Optional[Boolean],
      'onlink' => Optional[Boolean],
}]]
```

### <a name="Bird--Table"></a>`Bird::Table`

table config

Alias of

```puppet
Struct[{
    'nettype'         => Enum['ipv4', 'ipv4 sadr', 'ipv6', 'ipv6 sadr', 'vpn4', 'vpn6', 'roa4', 'roa6', 'flow4', 'flow6', 'mpls'],
    'debug'           => Optional[Enum['all','off']],
    'sorted'          => Optional[Boolean],
    'trie'            => Optional[Boolean],
    'min_settle_time' => Optional[String[1]],
    'max_settle_time' => Optional[String[1]],
    'gc_threshold'    => Optional[Integer],
    'gc_period'       => Optional[String[1]],
}]
```
